stories.title: Tech's Sorsby files injunction, seeks '26 eligibil...
stories.summary: Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby has filed for an injunction against the NCAA on Monday, seeking his college eligibility for the 2026 football season.

stories.title: Pelicans hiring Mosley as head coach, sources say
stories.summary: The Pelicans have hired Jamahl Mosley as their new head coach. He spent the past five seasons in Orlando, going 189-221 and earning three playoff berths.
